title: PageCapture
description: Schema for [PageName].md frontmatter and section structure produced by page-capture skill

name.description: Page name used as file name and component name

sourceUrl.description: Original URL of the captured page

mode.description: verbatim: computed styles as-is; tokenized: abstracted to design tokens

styling.description: Target styling system when generating React components. Optional — only needed if md-to-react will be run

screenshot.description: Relative path to full-page screenshot PNG

sections.description: Required top-level sections in the markdown body
